regions.title: Detroit Minyan Finder
regions.sub: Vaad 5786 summer sheet · times resolve live for the day shown

hillelAA.name: Hillel of Ann Arbor (U of M)

regions.legend: Zmanim computed for your selected location (plag = GRA, netz + 10¾ sha'os zmaniyos; tzeis shown at 8.5° — your luach governs). Distances are straight-line approximations. "School in session" minyanim run only when the yeshiva is in session. Source: Vaad Harabbonim Detroit Metro Spring/Summer/Fall 5786 sheet (March 2026) — confirm with the shul; corrections: YosiHeber@gmail.com.

regions.title: Miami Minyanim (NMB)
regions.sub: North Miami Beach community sheet · FloridaMinyan.com
regions.legend: Source: FloridaMinyan.com — North Miami Beach sheet (updated 5/5/26). Shachris are the shuls' fixed times; Mincha/Maariv resolve to your live zmanim. Confirm with the shul; GoDaven's live time is shown where it differs.

regions.title: Palm Beach Minyanim (Boca)
regions.sub: Central Boca shuls · Kosher Boca Raton + shul schedules
regions.legend: Source: Kosher Boca Raton + the Central Boca shuls' own schedules. Shachris & fixed evening minyanim are the shuls' set times; afternoon Mincha/Maariv are computed to shkiah. Refreshed monthly — confirm with the shul; GoDaven's live time is shown where it differs.

regions.title: Lakewood Minyanim
regions.sub: Live minyan times near you · zmanim computed for your location
regions.legend: Zmanim are computed for your GPS location. Minyan times load live from GoDaven (community-maintained) each time you open the app, sanity-checked against computed zmanim; implausible entries are hidden. Always confirm times with the shul before relying on them.
